articles.title: Exaforce raises $125M Series B to build AI for catching and stopping cyberattacks as they happen
articles.description: The round valued the three-year-old startup at $725 million.

articles.title: Waymo issues recall to deal with a flooding problem
articles.description: Waymo has issued a software recall that makes its robotaxis more cautious around flooded areas. A "final remedy" is in the works.

articles.title: Instructure strikes deal with hackers who breached it twice
articles.description: The maker of the Canvas school software said it "reached an agreement" with the hackers, but provided no guarantees that the hackers would not release the data or keep their word.

articles.title: Dessn raises $6M for its production focused design tool
articles.description: A new startup called Dessn has raised $6M to build AI-powered design tools that work directly with production codebases.

articles.title: TikTok now wants to be the place you book the trip you just saw on TikTok
articles.description: TikTok is systematically converting its discovery engine into a transaction layer, which both deepens user retention and opens entirely new revenue streams for its new owners.

articles.title: AI is turning connected cars into pothole-finding machines
articles.description: Fleet management company Samsara has developed an AI model to detect different kinds of potholes and gauge how fast they're deteriorating.

articles.title: Spotify’s launches a Wrapped-style recap of your entire listening history
articles.description: Spotify's new feature will show you the number of unique songs that you listened to until now

articles.title: AI voice startup Vapi hits $500M valuation after winning Amazon Ring over 40 rivals
articles.description: Vapi says its enterprise business has grown 10-fold since early 2025 as companies shift customer support and sales calls to AI agents.

articles.title: Amazon launches 30-minute delivery across the U.S.
articles.description: Amazon says its new ultra-fast delivery option brings groceries, household essentials, and other items to customers’ doors in 30 minutes.

articles.title: Thinking Machines wants to build an AI that actually listens while it talks
articles.description: Right now, every AI model you've ever used works the same way. You talk, it listens. It responds, you listen. Thinking Machines is trying to change that by building a model that processes your input and generates a response at the same time, so it's more like a phone call than a text chain.

articles.title: Riding an AI rally, Robinhood preps second retail venture IPO
articles.description: Robinhood files confidentially for its second venture fund, this time targeting growth and early-stage startups.

articles.title: GM just laid off hundreds of IT workers to hire those with stronger AI skills
articles.description: Some of the positions focus on AI-native development, data engineering and analytics, cloud-based engineering, and agent and model development as well as prompt engineering and new AI workflows.

articles.title: Finally, texts between Android and iPhone users can be end-to-end encrypted
articles.description: Google had urged Apple for years to support RCS texting to make communication between each company's devices more seamless.

articles.title: Daniel Ek-backed defense tech Helsing to raise $1.2B at $18B valuation
articles.description: Five-year old European military drone startup Helsing is close to raising another monster round.

articles.title: Bravo is creating unscripted microdramas for the Peacock app
articles.description: As microdrama apps like ReelShort and DramaBox quietly rake in billions, Peacock announced on Monday that it is launching two unscripted Bravo microdramas, which will stream in the Peacock app.

articles.title: Digg tries again, this time as an AI news aggregator
articles.description: In an email to beta testers, the company said the site's goal is to "track the most influential voices in a space" and to surface the news that's actually worth "paying attention to."

articles.title: ‘Too early’ to talk IPO, Redwood Materials’ incoming CFO says
articles.description: The battery-recycling and energy-storage company has hired former Tesla finance chief Deepak Ahuja, reuniting him with former Tesla CTO JB Straubel.

articles.title: NYT’s Wordle to become a TV game show
articles.description: This will be the first time that The Times has collaborated with a TV broadcaster for an entertainment-based program, representing yet another pivot in the media company's attempt to build a sustainable digital subscription business as print revenue continues to decline.

articles.title: TikTok launches an ad-free subscription plan in the UK
articles.description: Users who sign up for the plan won’t see ads on TikTok, and their data won’t be used for advertising purposes.

articles.title: There aren’t enough rockets for space data centers — Cowboy Space raised $275M to build them
articles.description: The apparently insatiable demand for AI compute has data center entrepreneurs looking to the stars. There's a key problem: There aren't enough rockets to put data centers in orbit around Earth, and they're too expensive.

articles.title: Amazon employees are "tokenmaxxing" due to pressure to use AI tools
articles.description: Workers are using an internal AI tool to automate non-essential tasks.

articles.title: Once again, SpaceX has set a new record for the tallest rocket ever built
articles.description: SpaceX cleared an important milestone Monday on the road to launching a new version of Starship.

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
articles.description: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.

articles.title: Audi has a new Q9 flagship coming soon: Here's its interior
articles.description: Audi made sure to consult American tastes for its first full-size SUV.

articles.title: After banning foreign routers, FCC says existing ones can get updates until 2029
articles.description: FCC extends waiver allowing routers and drones to get patches for two more years.

articles.title: Data center guzzled 30 million gallons of water, and nobody noticed for months
articles.description: Can AI save us from the AI industry’s endless thirst for water? Outlook not so good.

articles.title: Passengers from hantavirus ship arrive in US; 3 people in biocontainment
articles.description: A US passenger tested "mildly positive," but WHO is calling it "inconclusive" for now.

articles.title: Starlink shuts down its GPS-style cheat code. Researchers may unlock it anyway.
articles.description: Shutdown of Starlink location feature won’t dampen interest in GPS alternatives.

articles.title: iOS, macOS, and iPadOS 26.5 updates arrive with encrypted RCS messaging and more
articles.description: Probably the last big updates we'll see before the next versions appear at WWDC.

articles.title: Samsung made a “mockery” of Dua Lipa by putting her picture on TV boxes, lawsuit says
articles.description: Lipa says her picture contributed to Samsung's "enormous revenue."

articles.title: Pirates are already playing Forza Horizon 6 days before its launch
articles.description: Crackers take advantage of unencrypted files that briefly appeared on Steam.

articles.title: F1 set for another engine tweak in 2027, and what's this about V8s?
articles.description: Rather than dig in, the sport is being proactive about fixing the problem.

articles.title: A promising Indian launch startup nears its first orbital test flight
articles.description: "We wanted to get to an orbital launch vehicle in a few years."

articles.title: Sony's failed war against Internet piracy may doom other copyright lawsuits
articles.description: Cable firm Cox's Supreme Court win may help all tech providers, not just ISPs.

articles.title: Do you take after your dad’s RNA?
articles.description: Evidence is growing that sperm carries marks of a father’s life experiences, influencing traits in offspring.

articles.title: Huge landslide created a 500-meter-high tsunami in a major tourist area
articles.description: Fortunately, it happened early in the morning, so nobody was around.

articles.title: eBay Rejects GameStop's $56B Takeover as Not Credible
articles.description: Article URL: https://www.bloomberg.com/news/articles/2026-05-12/ebay-rejects-gamestop-s-56-billion-takeover-as-not-credible Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48110021 Points: 29 # Comments: 11

articles.title: The Future of Obsidian Plugins
articles.description: Article URL: https://obsidian.md/blog/future-of-plugins/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48109970 Points: 11 # Comments: 1

articles.title: Launch HN: Voker (YC S24) – Analytics for AI Agents
articles.description: Hey HN, we're Alex and Tyler, co-founders of Voker.ai ( https://voker.ai/ ), an agent analytics platform for AI product teams. Voker gives full visibility into what users are asking of your agents, and whether your agents are delivering, without having to dig through logs. Our main product is a lightweight SDK that is LLM stack agnostic and purpose-built for agent products. Agent Engineers and AI product teams don’t have the right level of visibility into agent performance in production, which results in bad user experiences, churn, and hundreds of hours wasted with spot checks to find and deb

articles.title: Operation: Epic Furious
articles.description: Article URL: https://www.epicfurious.com/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48109519 Points: 48 # Comments: 7

tech.summary:
今日科技动态摘要

1. **网络安全与AI防御**：Exaforce获1.25亿美元B轮融资，开发实时拦截网络攻击的AI系统；Instructure与两次入侵其系统的黑客达成和解协议，凸显企业安全挑战。
2. **自动驾驶与AI应用拓展**：Waymo因车辆漏水问题发起召回；AI技术正将联网汽车转化为自动探测路面坑洼的工具，提升道路维护效率。
3. **AI语音与硬件整合**：AI语音初创公司Vapi在击败40多家竞争对手赢得亚马逊Ring订单后，估值达5亿美元；Thinking Machines致力于开发能“边听边答”的对话AI。
4. **科技巨头战略调整**：通用汽车裁减数百名IT员工，转而招聘AI技能更强的员工；Robinhood借助AI热潮筹备旗下第二家零售企业的IPO。
5. **数字服务与内容创新**：亚马逊在美国推出30分钟送达服务；TikTok计划将平台打造成用户“即看即订”的旅行预订入口；Bravo为Peacock应用制作无脚本微短剧。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：AI技术正从网络安全、自动驾驶到语音交互全面渗透，同时引发科技巨头的人才结构剧变与商业模式创新。

ai.summary:
今日AI动态摘要

1. **AWS与Hugging Face合作推进基础模型训练与推理**：介绍了在AWS上构建基础模型训练和推理的模块化方法，并探讨了混合专家模型（EMO）的预训练技术，旨在提升模型的模块化能力。
2. **OpenAI多领域扩展与部署**：包括ChatGPT在2026年初的广泛采用、企业级AI规模化部署、推出DeployCo帮助企业构建智能应用，以及通过GPT-5.5和GPT-5.5-Cyber增强网络安全的可信访问能力。
3. **Google AI应用落地与功能更新**：AI驱动的Google Finance扩展至欧洲、创意人士用AI为小企业制作广告、搜索功能新增5项园艺技巧，以及语音智能API的模型升级。
4. **AI模型性能与安全性优化**：vLLM从V0到V1的强化学习正确性改进、Open ASR排行榜添加防作弊机制（Benchmaxxer Repellant），以及OpenAI安全运行Codex的经验分享。
5. **企业与客户交互智能化**：Parla通过AI构建用户愿意交流的服务代理，以及OpenAI在API中推出新型语音智能模型。

**今日最值得关注的发展**：OpenAI通过DeployCo、GPT-5.5系列及语音模型升级，全面加速企业级AI部署与安全应用，同时Google在金融、广告和搜索领域深化AI落地，标志着AI正从技术实验转向规模化商业与生活场景渗透。

articles.title: Tokyo Trial debunks notorious Yasukuni Shrine's inverted narrative

cctv.summary:
今日新闻联播动态摘要

1. 东京审判揭露了靖国神社歪曲历史、颠倒黑白的错误叙事。
2. 强调国际社会对日本军国主义罪行的正义审判与历史定论。
3. 批评靖国神社及其相关叙事试图美化侵略历史、误导公众认知。

今日最值得关注的发展是：东京审判的历史真相再次被强调，以正视听，驳斥靖国神社的错误历史观。
